titleStmt.title: SII 30.183: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 183. (A.R. No. 259 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara Temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājādhirāja-Chōḻa I: Year 30, day 165: 1048 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti, tiṅgaḷēr taru etc. It records the decision of selling 2000 kuḻi of the common land [ūr-mañjikkam] by the mahāsabhā of Karaikkōṭṭu brahmadēyam alias Parākramasōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam while they met at the temple of Tiruvāypāḍi dēva (Krishṇa) situated in the western part of the village, to the temple (Sri Pōndaiuḍaiyār) probably for providing food offerings (tirumaḍaippaḷḷippuṟam) to the deity Āḍavallāṉ Parākramasōḻaviṭaṅkar by three individuals namely Mādhavasara bhaṭṭan, Iḷaiya Nambitta Kramavittaṉ and Iḷaiya Santāna Kramavittaṉ of Seṅgōṭṭuch-chēri. The temple committee agreed to maintain this charity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer taru tanṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kīḻ nilamakaḻ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅ
kolocci karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātaiyaiyum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikoḷ taṉṉiḷaṅ kōkki
ḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar taṉṟirupputalvar tammaiyum tunṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ villavaṉ mīṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ Ilaṅkaiyaṟ
kiṟaivaṉ pulaṅkeḻiṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaneṉa poṉṉaṇi cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭi paṭar pukaḻ
Āṅkavaṟka nāṭaruḷi pāṅkuṟa maṉṉu pallūḻiyuṭ teṉṉavar mūvaruḷ māṉāparunaṉ poṉmuṭiyāṉāp paru
matuṭ pacuntalai porukaḷattarintu vāraḷaviya kaḻal vīrakeraḷaṉai muṉaivaiyiṟ piṭittu taṉāṉaikkiṭuvittu Atti
vāraṇak kaṭakaḷiṟṟālutaippittaruḷi Antamil perumpukaṭ cuntara pāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇku
ṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇkavariyum ciṅkātaṉamum veṅkaḷattiḻintu taṉmuṭi viḻat talaivirittaṭi taḷarṉtollai
yil mullaiyūrt turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻ Irāmakuṭamūvar keṭa muṉintu miṭa keḻu
nāṭu viṭṭoṭi kāṭupukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar malaintāṅku
ḻu villavaṉ maṭi koṇṭu
keḻu kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppittu Ākavamallaṉum Añca kevutaṉṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ
kaṇṭappaiyaṉum kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal virutar vikkiyum vicaiyātit
taṉum tarumuraṭ cāṅkamaiyaṉu mutaliṉar camarapīruvottuṭaiya nimircuṭarp poṉṉoṭu Aiṅkatip puraviyoṭu
piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅ koṇṭu Oṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppittu Oru taṉittaṇṭāl po
ru kaṭalilaṅkaiyar komāṉ vikkiramabāhuviṉ makuṭamum kāṇṭaku taṉṉatākiya kaṉṉakkucciyiṉu
mārkali yīḻañ cīriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ taṉṉāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅkumuṭi kuvitta vīracalāmekaṉ
poṟkaḷattañci kāṟkaḷiṟiḻintu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭi kātaliyoṭun taṉ ṟavvaiyaip piṭittu tāyai mūkkariya Āṅkava
māṉa nīṅkutaṟkāka mīṭṭu vantu vāṭṭoḻiluḻantu veṅkaḷattulantavac ciṅkaḷattaraicaṉ poṉṉaṇi muṭiyum kaṉ
ṉaraṉ vaḻivanturai koḷīḻattaracaṉākiya cirivallavaṉ mataṉarācaṉ Elloḷit taṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulattu Iru
kālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti taṇṭar tiṉakaraṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal matucūtaṉaṉeṉa
palavaraicarai muṉaiviya turatti vampalar tarupoḻil kampili nakaruḷ cāḷukkiyar māḷikait takarppittiretamil villavar
mīṉavar veḷaccaḷukkiyar vallavar kocalar paṅkaḷar koṅkaṇar ciṅkaṇaraiyaṇar Antira mutalliya Aracarṉā
ṭu niṟaikaḷum Āṟiloṉṟavaniyiṭa kūṟukoḷ nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantu koḷak kuṭuttu vi
śvalokattu viḷaṅka maṉuneṟi jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉ Uyarnta perum pukaḻko
virājakesaripanmamarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu muppatāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟarupattañciṉāl Ulaku
ṭaiyār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuram jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmarkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu karaikkoṭṭu brahma
deyamāṉa parākramacoḻa catuppetimaṅkalattu māhasabhaipRead- mahāsabhaiperuṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom nammūr melait tiru
vāyppāṭidevar koyilil kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟa kūṭiyiruntu nammūr śrīpontai Uṭaiyār Ātidāsa śaṇḍeśvara rājñaiye
ḻuttiṭṭu yāṅkaḷ viṟkiṉṟa Ūrmañcikkamākiṉṟa bhumiyāvatu nammūr kaṭipperiyāṉa śrīmadhirāntakappererik kīḻ kali(ṅ)ṅki
lukku vaṭakku kolāl nilam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Ikkolāl kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum tecavatikku kīḻpāṟ kellai kollai nilat
tukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai viḷainilattukku teṟkum Innāṟpāṟ kellaikku Uṭpaṭa naṭuvil kollai nilam kuḻi 10 3 Ā
yiramum patiṉaṟucāṇ kolāl viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatu muṟ collappaṭṭa Inṉāṟ
pālellaiyuḷ Iṟaiveṭṭi kolāl nilam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttu Emmilicaintu vilaip po
ruḷ muṟṟum Aṟakkoṇṭu Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ celavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvall(ā)tu veṟu poru
ḷmāvaṟutip poruḷc celavolai kāṭṭeṉṉap peṟātomākavum peri koṭṭi viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytutantom Iṉṉilam vaṟaiyi
li tevatāṉamāka Iṟai tavirntu devatāna nilamākap peṟuvilaik kāṇi
Avaikkaṇ mādhavasara bhaṭṭaṉum māṭalampāttu Iḷaiya nampit takkiramavittaṉum ceṅkāṭṭucceri Iḷaiya [ sandhāna] perumān kirama
vittanum maṇiyaracan nilam Ikkoyilil Āṭavalār parākkirama coḻa viṭaṅkarkku Ucciyampotai sandhikku tiruvamutukku Arici nāṉāḻikku
Aṟukuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum neyyamutu mucceviṭum kaṟiyamutukku nel Oru ceviṭum Āka nel
raṇṭukku nellu muvuḻakkum Aṭaikkāyamutu veṟuṅkāy nālum veṟṟilai paṉṉiraṇṭukku
nivantam muṭṭāmai Iśrīkoyil vāriyañ ceyvāre Aṭuttu ceyvārkaḷākavum [ śilālekai] ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom
nallūr kiḻavan cāttan pavaḻakunṟum Ivai paṇiyāl tevaṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 30.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
